Family Owned Since 1993

Three Generations of Metal Finishing

In 1993 Mark Torzy purchased this shop. Mark and his wife ran the shop while raising their three children. The vibratory bowls were part of everyday family life.

Today his middle son Kyle Torzy runs operations after 15 years learning directly from his father. Same machines, same standards you trusted from the KVF name — now proudly independent with personal, family-first care.

What We Do Best

Vibratory Tumbling Only

Deburring

Sharp edges and burrs removed safely and consistently on stamped and machined parts.

Polishing

Bright, smooth finishes on seat strikers, snap plates, brackets and precision components.

Send your parts — we’ll run them at no charge so you can feel the difference.
